title: Oral health - Canada.ca
content:
Oral health, how to apply for dental coverage and industry guidance.
Applications are open
The Canadian  Dental Care Plan (CDCP) is helping make the cost of dental care more  affordable for eligible Canadian residents.
Canadians of all ages can now apply for the CDCP.

## Services and information

### Taking care of your teeth and mouth
Proper teeth cleaning for infants, children, adults, seniors and pregnant people

### Oral diseases and conditions
Causes, symptoms, risks, prevention and treatment
Sources, benefits for your teeth, health effects and proper use for children

### Canadian Dental Care Plan
A plan to ease financial barriers to accessing oral health care for eligible Canadians
- Public Health Agency of Canada
- Employment and Social Development Canada
